name: Individual Thai Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------THAI PEANUT SAUCE-----------------------------
2/3 cup Smooth peanut butter
2 tbsp Sugar
2 tbsp Water
2 tbsp Seasoned rice vinegar
2 tsp Soy sauce
2 tsp Oriental sesame oil
2 tsp Cider vinegar
1. Place bread shells, cup sides up, on 2 baking sheets, each measuring 12" x 15". Spread the sauce evenly over the cups in the bread. Scatter bean sprouts equally on the crusts, then sprinkle with cheese.
2. Bake in a 350°F oven until the cheese has melted and begun to brown, for 12-15 minutes (if using one oven, switch pan positions after 7 minutes). Place pizzas on dinner plates; top evenly with shrimp and onion. Add chilies to taste; eat with knife and fork, or cut into wedges to pick up and eat.
THAI PEANUT SAUCE
Combine water, soy sauce, cider vinegar, and sugar in a bowl. Mix well. Stir this mixture into peanut butter, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
